repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(P.publication_date), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS year_start,
    AVG(COUNT(DISTINCT i.name)) OVER () AS avg_inventors_per_patent,
    COUNT(*) AS total_publications_ca
FROM 
    PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS P
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => P.inventor_harmonized) i
WHERE 
    i.country_code = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR(P.publication_date), 'YYYYMMDD'))
ORDER BY 
    year_start

SELECT 
    assignee[0]:["assignee"].TEXT AS assignee,
    STRING_AGG(ipc[0]:["code"].TEXT, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS jurisdiction_codes
FROM 
    "PATENTS"."PATENTS"."PUBLICATIONS"
WHERE 
    assignee IS NOT NULL AND 
    ipc IS NOT NULL AND 
    assignee[0]:["assignee"].TEXT ILIKE '%A61%'
GROUP BY 
    assignee[0]:["assignee"].TEXT
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.filing_date) AS filing_year
FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS p
JOIN (
    SELECT application_number
    FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS
    WHERE assignee:assignee[0]:text LIKE '%A61%'
    GROUP BY application_number
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
) sub ON p.application_number = sub.application_number
ORDER BY filing_year DESC
LIMIT 1
